glosses.ja: 働いている; 就業している

translations.en: I’m employed as a childcare worker.
translations.fr: Je travaille comme éducatrice de jeunes enfants.
translations.vi: Tôi làm giáo viên mầm non.
translations.hi: मैं बाल देखभाल कर्मी के रूप में काम करती हूँ।
translations.cs: Pracuji jako učitelka v mateřské škole.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder som pædagog i en børnehave.
translations.ja: 私は保育士として働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 1st sg) linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Predicate adjective meaning ‘gainfully employed’; predicative complement to the copula.
Preposition introducing a role NP; here complements the predicate adjective to specify capacity.
Common noun (fem. sg) as complement to ‘als’, specifying the role in which the subject is employed.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester ist in Teilzeit berufstätig.

translations.de: Meine Schwester ist in Teilzeit berufstätig.
translations.es: Mi hermana trabaja a tiempo parcial.
translations.fr: Ma sœur travaille à temps partiel.
translations.pt: Minha irmã trabalha em meio período.
translations.vi: Chị gái tôi làm bán thời gian.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन पार्ट-टाइम काम करती है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra pracuje na pół etatu.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου δουλεύει με μερική απασχόληση.
translations.cs: Moje sestra pracuje na částečný úvazek.
translations.ja: 姉はパートで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (fem. sg nominative) modifying ‘Schwester’.
Common noun (feminine); head of the subject NP.
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) linking subject to predicative complement.
Preposition heading a PP that functions as an adverbial of manner/schedule.
Noun within the PP ‘in Teilzeit’; object of the preposition expressing work arrangement.
Predicate adjective complement to the copula, describing the subject’s employment status.

sentences.target: Viele Studierende sind neben dem Studium berufstätig.
sentences.reading: /ˈfiːlə ʃtuˈdiːʁəndə zɪnt ˈneːbən deːm ˈʃtuːdi̯ʊm bəˈʁuːfstɛːtɪç/

translations.de: Viele Studierende sind neben dem Studium berufstätig.
translations.ipa: /ˈfiːlə ʃtuˈdiːʁəndə zɪnt ˈneːbən deːm ˈʃtuːdi̯ʊm bəˈʁuːfstɛːtɪç/
translations.en: Many students work alongside their studies.
translations.fr: Beaucoup d’étudiants travaillent pendant leurs études.
translations.zh-Hans: 很多学生一边读书一边工作。
translations.yue: 好多學生一邊讀書一邊打工。
translations.ru: Многие студенты работают во время учёбы.
translations.vi: Nhiều sinh viên vừa học vừa làm.
translations.ar: كثير من الطلاب يعملون أثناء دراستهم.
translations.nl: Veel studenten werken naast hun studie.
translations.uk: Багато студентів працюють під час навчання.
translations.hi: कई छात्र पढ़ाई के साथ-साथ काम भी करते हैं।
translations.pl: Wielu studentów pracuje w trakcie studiów.
translations.el: Πολλοί φοιτητές δουλεύουν παράλληλα με τις σπουδές τους.
translations.nb: Mange studenter jobber ved siden av studiene.
translations.sv: Många studenter jobbar vid sidan av studierna.
translations.ro: Mulți studenți lucrează în timpul studiilor.
translations.da: Mange studerende arbejder ved siden af studiet.
translations.fi: Monet opiskelijat käyvät töissä opintojen ohella.
translations.ja: 多くの学生は勉強しながら働いています。

tokens.explanation: Quantifying determiner modifying ‘Studierende’; indicates plural quantity.
Plural common noun (nominalized participle) serving as the subject.
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 3rd pl) linking subject to predicative complement.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a PP meaning ‘in addition to/alongside’.
Definite article, dative singular (neuter) agreeing with ‘Studium’ within the PP.
Common noun (neuter, dat. sg) as object of ‘neben’; denotes the course of study.
Predicate adjective; complements the copula, stating employment alongside studies.

sentences.target: Er bleibt berufstätig trotz der Kinder.

translations.de: Er bleibt berufstätig trotz der Kinder.
translations.en: He keeps working despite the kids.
translations.es: A pesar de los hijos, él sigue trabajando.
translations.fr: Il continue à travailler malgré les enfants.
translations.it: Continua a lavorare nonostante i figli.
translations.zh-Hans: 尽管有孩子，他还是继续工作。
translations.yue: 雖然有小朋友，他仍然繼續返工。
translations.ru: Несмотря на детей, он продолжает работать.
translations.pt: Ele continua trabalhando apesar dos filhos.
translations.tr: Çocukları olmasına rağmen çalışmaya devam ediyor.
translations.vi: Dù có con, anh ấy vẫn tiếp tục làm việc.
translations.ar: رغم وجود أطفال، فهو يواصل العمل.
translations.nl: Ondanks de kinderen blijft hij werken.
translations.hu: A gyerekek ellenére továbbra is dolgozik.
translations.hi: बच्चे होने के बावजूद वह काम करता रहता है।
translations.el: Παρά τα παιδιά, συνεχίζει να δουλεύει.
translations.nb: Til tross for barna fortsetter han å jobbe.
translations.id: Meski punya anak, dia tetap bekerja.
translations.sv: Trots barnen fortsätter han att jobba.
translations.ro: În ciuda copiilor, el continuă să lucreze.
translations.da: På trods af børnene fortsætter han med at arbejde.
translations.ja: 子どもがいても彼は仕事を続けています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb (present, 3rd sg) functioning as a linking verb meaning ‘to remain’; takes a predicative complement.
Predicate adjective complement to ‘bleibt’, indicating continued employment.
Preposition governing the genitive; introduces a concessive PP.
Definite article, genitive plural agreeing with ‘Kinder’ within the PP headed by ‘trotz’.
Common noun (plural, genitive) as object of ‘trotz’; expresses the concession context.
